site.name: Kunwar Dairy
site.logoTagline: Farm Se Seedha Aapke Ghar Tak
site.hindiTagline: शुद्ध दूध, Seedha Aapke Ghar Tak
site.description: Order fresh farm milk, paneer, curd, ghee and manage subscriptions online with Kunwar Dairy.
site.footerDesc: Kunwar Dairy se aapke ghar tak shuddh, taaza aur poshtik dairy products — bina kisi bichauliye ke.
site.promo: 🎉 10% OFF on your First order | Use FRESH10
site.deliveryNote: Same-day delivery in Bihar* | Farm-fresh daily
site.serviceNote: Proudly serving customers throughout Bihar, India
site.footerTagline: Join us on a journey that promises not just sustenance but soulful nourishment.

hero.title: Discover the Finest Dairy That Elevates Your Kitchen
hero.subtitle: Farm-fresh milk, ghee, dahi, paneer & chaach — delivered straight from our farm to your home.

categories.label: Milk
categories.desc: 100% pure cow milk, delivered fresh every morning from our farm.

categories.label: Desi Ghee
categories.desc: Traditional bilona-style ghee — pure, aromatic and nutrient-rich.

categories.label: Curd & Paneer
categories.desc: Fresh dahi and soft paneer made daily with farm-fresh milk.

categories.label: Chaach
categories.desc: Refreshing and healthy chaach — perfect for every season.

categories.label: Paneer
categories.desc: Soft, protein-rich paneer for your favourite home recipes.

whyChoose.title: Quality
whyChoose.desc: All products meet the highest purity and freshness standards.

whyChoose.title: Sustainability
whyChoose.desc: Responsible farming with minimal environmental impact.

whyChoose.title: Health & Wellness
whyChoose.desc: Natural, wholesome dairy for a balanced nutritious diet.

whyChoose.title: Authenticity
whyChoose.desc: Traditional methods preserving real farm-fresh taste.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.quote: Kunwar Dairy ka doodh bahut fresh hai. Subah delivery milti hai aur doodh ka taste bilkul gaon jaisa. Ghee bhi amazing hai — roti par lagate hi khushboo aa jati hai.

testimonials.name: Rahul Kumar
testimonials.quote: Paneer soft aur fresh milta hai, market wale se kaafi better. WhatsApp order karna easy hai aur delivery time par hoti hai. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Anita Devi
testimonials.quote: Humara poora parivaar Kunwar Dairy ka dahi aur chaach use karta hai. Koi preservatives nahi, bilkul natural. Farm se seedha ghar tak — sach mein!

about.label: About Us
about.title: About Kunwar Dairy
about.imageAlt: Kunwar Dairy — fresh milk, healthy cows, happy farm
about.body: We raise healthy cows on our own farm, process milk with modern hygienic equipment, and deliver fresh dairy products directly to your doorstep — no middlemen, no compromise on quality.

farm.label: Our Farm
farm.title: Jahan Se Shuru Hoti Hai Shuddhata
farm.description: Kunwar Dairy mein hum har din taaza, poshtik aur shuddh dairy products taiyaar karte hain. Operated by Shree Shyam Dairy Farm — hamare gaayon ko saaf-suthra vatavaran, santulit aahar aur niyamit veterinary care di jaati hai.

contact.label: Contact Us
contact.title: Let's Answer Your Queries
contact.subtitle: Visit our farm, call us, or drop a message — we're happy to help.

testimonialsSection.label: Testimonials
testimonialsSection.title: Stories of Satisfaction
testimonialsSection.subtitle: Real voices from families who choose farm-fresh dairy, every single day.

chatAssistant.name: Kunwar AI
chatAssistant.title: Farm Assistant
chatAssistant.greeting: Namaste! 🙏 Main Kunwar Dairy ka AI assistant hoon. Products, prices, delivery, ya order — kuch bhi poochho!
